primaryText: Did Cole acknowledge that Julian dances salsa?
translation: Did Cole acknowledge that Julian dances salsa?
context: Projection of the complement content 'Julian dances salsa' under the 'certain that' diagnostic (Exp 1 projection block), measured with a higher- vs lower-probability background fact about the content.
comment: By-predicate mean certainty (projection, x100) over 20 contents and both facts, n=286, from results/9-prior-projection/data/cd.csv at github.com/judith-tonhauser/projective-probability. certaintyHigh/Low = mean projection under higher/lower-probability fact; priorHigh/Low = mean prior credence. Main-clause control mean = 21.
